name: RASTPLATS rug, flatwoven
description: RASTPLATS Rug, flatwoven - handmade beige/black 5 ' 7 "x7 ' 10 ". Ideal in your living room or under your dining table since the flat-woven surface makes it easy to pull out the chairs and vacuum. Use STOPP FILT anti-slip rug underlay under the entire rug for increased safety. Contains sheep wool.
